context: Tests whether the agent implements invoice ingestion and three-way matching following the skill's specific conventions: filtering attachment types, vendor resolution with fallback to manual review, due date calculation from net-day terms, 1% matching tolerance, correct exception logic, match status derivation rules, currency preservation, and invoice locking after approval.

checklist.name: Attachment type filter
checklist.description: Email ingestion only processes attachments with content types in: application/pdf, image/png, image/jpeg (skips all others)

checklist.name: Vendor resolution with fallback
checklist.description: Vendor lookup uses BOTH email sender domain AND extracted vendor name; unknown vendors are flagged for manual review and the email is skipped (not thrown as an error)

checklist.name: Due date from net terms
checklist.description: Due date is calculated by parsing vendor payment terms as 'net{N}' (e.g., 'net30' → 30 days), with a default of 30 days when terms don't match

checklist.name: Original currency preserved
checklist.description: Invoice is saved with the extracted original currency (e.g., EUR, GBP) rather than converting to USD on ingest

checklist.name: No-PO exception
checklist.description: Three-way match returns exception status immediately when no PO is linked to the invoice

checklist.name: 1% tolerance applied
checklist.description: Invoice-to-PO total comparison uses a tolerance of 1% of the PO cost (not hard equality) — variances within 1% do NOT generate an exception

checklist.name: Line-level quantity check
checklist.description: Match logic checks that quantity_received (from goods receipt) is not less than invoice line quantity for each matched line

checklist.name: Line-level price check
checklist.description: Match logic checks for unit price mismatches between invoice lines and corresponding PO lines

checklist.name: No-receipt exception
checklist.description: When no goods receipt is linked to the invoice, an exception is added (e.g., 'No goods receipt on file') rather than silently passing

checklist.name: Match status derivation
checklist.description: Final match_status is derived as: 'matched' when no exceptions, 'partial' when exceptions exist but variance is 0, 'exception' otherwise

checklist.name: Invoice lock enforcement
checklist.description: The lock function prevents modifications to total_cents, due_date, and vendor_id after an invoice reaches 'approved' status (throws or rejects edit attempts on these fields)

checklist.name: AP event logging
checklist.description: The three-way match result is logged using logApEvent (or equivalent audit trail call) with the match status, variance, and exceptions
